rationale: All empirical checks pass at 997e2a9e. go build ./... clean. go test -count=1 ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/setup ./cmd/mindspec all ok. TestLifecycleOwnershipExactlyOneWorkflowClaimant PASS; TestClaimsLifecyclePackageDiscrimination PASS with all 4 subtests (broader internal/** glob caught, exact-duplicate glob caught, workflow-removed caught, narrower sibling not falsely claimed) — confirms Finding 2's overlap-matcher genuinely discriminates. AC9: 'impl approve' appears 5x in ADR-0037 (>=1); 'closed without' appears 2x in each of claude.go, .claude/skills/ms-impl-approve/SKILL.md, .agents/skills/ms-impl-approve/SKILL.md (>=1 each) — Finding 1's scoped/consistent language is present across all 3 skill surfaces plus the generator. gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty, go vet clean, golangci-lint 0 issues on both packages. mindspec validate spec 115-impl-approve-panel-gate: all checks passed. git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ empty (0 lines); no BranchExistsE/show-ref hits; no fence-violation strings (raw git merge, no-verify, MINDSPEC_ALLOW_MAIN) in the delta. git diff --stat 1733886e..997e2a9e touches exactly the 5 expected files (ADR-0037, 2 SKILL.md copies, claude.go, ownership_test.go). git status --porcelain shows only the untracked reviews/ dir. No out-of-scope edits, no regressions.
